$comment: Sample data. onym-ios and onym-android pipelines overwrite this file on each release. Drop the is_sample flag in real publishes.

$schema_notes.issue.body: Optional. Full markdown body of the linked issue/PR. The build details page extracts the '## Test plan' section client-side. Keeps the page working offline / when GitHub API is rate-limited.
$schema_notes.issue.test_plan: Optional. Pre-extracted markdown of just the test-plan section. Use this if you don't want to embed the entire issue body.

builds.description: Fix login flow on iPad in landscape. New camera badge in identity hero.

issue.title: Login broken on iPad in landscape
issue.body:
On iPad in landscape orientation the login sheet collapses behind the keyboard and Continue is unreachable.

## Repro
1. Fresh install on iPad
2. Rotate to landscape before tapping Sign in
3. Sheet appears, keyboard pushes it offscreen

## Test plan
- [ ] Install on iPad in landscape — login sheet stays visible above the keyboard
- [ ] Rotate device mid-flow (portrait <-> landscape) — sheet repositions without losing focus
- [ ] Tap outside the sheet — dismisses cleanly, no orphaned overlay
- [ ] iPhone regression: confirm portrait login on iPhone 15 still works as before
- [ ] VoiceOver: focus order on the sheet matches the visual order

## Notes
The new camera badge in the identity hero is unrelated; it ships with this build but has its own QA in #43.

builds.description: Fix back-stack crash when switching identities mid-conversation.

issue.title: Crash: switching identity from chat returns to wrong screen
issue.body:
Switching to a different identity from inside an open chat crashes the app and, on resume, lands on the wrong identity's home.

## Test plan
- [ ] Open a chat under identity A, switch to identity B from the toolbar — no crash, lands on B's home
- [ ] Repeat with three identities (A -> B -> C -> A) — back stack stays sane
- [ ] Background the app mid-switch, foreground after 30s — restores to the correct identity
- [ ] Empty state: brand-new install with one identity — switcher is hidden, no crash on the toolbar tap
- [ ] Talkback: announces the new identity name on switch

builds.description: v0.0.13 — Identities flow rewrite. Per-identity backups. QR invite hero.
v0.0.13 — matches iOS feature set. Per-identity backups, QR invites.
Spike: PLONK proof generation moved off-device for groups > 50 members.

issue.title: Group admit takes >2s on iPhone 12 with 64-member groups
issue.test_plan:
- [ ] Join a 64-member group on iPhone 12 — admit completes in < 800 ms
- [ ] Join a 200-member group on iPhone 15 Pro — admit completes in < 500 ms
- [ ] Airplane mode mid-admit — fails gracefully with a retry, no zombie membership state
- [ ] Verify proof on a different device — still verifies (proof object is unchanged)
- [ ] Battery: 10 sequential admits don't spike CPU above the baseline by more than 30%
